200.description: SSE Envelope stream. The first named event is the ResumeBoundary metadata frame.
SSE stream for one Task. The first named event is TaskResumeBoundary metadata.

CommandAccepted.description: Command accepted or has an unknown reporting outcome

CommandBadRequest.description: Rejected command or malformed transport request

Uint64Decimal.description: Canonical base-10 uint64 string. JSON numbers are not accepted.
